/usr/lib64/ccache/cc -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cli.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libcli.so -o libcli.so CMakeFiles/cli.dir/cli.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/crypto:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/queue ../utilities/crypto/libcrypto_utils.so -lkernel32 -lsodium ../utilities/queue/libqueue.so /usr/lib64/libglib-2.0.so
